title: Demo agent running while debug happens

log.context: Demo agent running while debug happens

All four commands ran successfully:

1. `echo "grug demo agent"` — printed `grug demo agent`
2. `sleep 10` — waited 10 seconds
3. `ls /mnt/data | head -5` — returned the first 5 entries: `backups`, `benchmark`, `bigclungus-meta`, `bin`, `bun.lock`
4. `echo "done"` — printed `done`
